---
title: "robust_zscore_normalize"
generated: true
description: "Median / MAD-based robust z-score normalisation."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.numerics.normalize`](../nitrix-numerics-normalize.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:robust_zscore_normalize -->
```python
robust_zscore_normalize(x: Num[Array, '...'], *, axis: _AxisArg = -1, eps: float = 1e-12) -> Num[Array, '...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:robust_zscore_normalize -->
Median / MAD-based robust z-score normalisation.

Computes $(x - \operatorname{median}) /
(1.4826 \operatorname{MAD} + \epsilon)$ along `axis`, using
the median and median-absolute-deviation in place of the mean
and standard deviation.  This is less sensitive to outliers
than [`zscore_normalize`](../nitrix-numerics-normalize/zscore_normalize.qmd).  The factor 1.4826 makes the MAD
a consistent estimator of the standard deviation for Gaussian
inputs.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:robust_zscore_normalize -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Num` | `...` | ‚Äî | Input tensor. |
| `axis` | `_AxisArg` | ‚Äî | `-1` | Axis (or axes) over which the median and MAD are reduced. Default `-1` (the trailing observation axis). |
| `eps` | `float` | ‚Äî | `1e-12` | Denominator stabiliser guarding a zero MAD. |

**Returns** `Num` ‚Äî shape `...`. Robustly z-scored tensor, same shape as `x`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:robust_zscore_normalize -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **1.42 ms** (median, L4); up to **73.6√ó faster** than `numpy.robust_zscore`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_ROBUST_ZSCORE_NORMALIZE.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=2048 | `cupy.robust_zscore_normalize` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=2048 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.178 s / 1.183 s | 1.448 s | 1280 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00043√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=2048 | `numpy.robust_zscore` | ok | 102.51 ms / 103.90 ms | 139.87 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00043√ótol | 0.09x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=2048 | `cupy.robust_zscore_normalize` | ok | 17.98 ms / 18.01 ms | 4.951 s | 16.78 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00043√ótol | 12.84x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=2048 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 1.40 ms / 1.42 ms | 1.280 s | 83.89 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00043√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=2048 | `numpy.robust_zscore` | ok | 101.89 ms / 103.54 ms | 139.33 ms | 16.78 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00043√ótol | 72.77x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `cupy.robust_zscore_normalize` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 5.245 s / 5.252 s | 5.711 s | 1280 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00042√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=4096 | `numpy.robust_zscore` | ok | 603.49 ms / 620.27 ms | 606.46 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00042√ótol | 0.12x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `cupy.robust_zscore_normalize` | ok | 73.93 ms / 74.01 ms | 312.10 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00042√ótol | 9.16x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 8.07 ms / 8.66 ms | 1.360 s | 335.54 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00042√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=4096 | `numpy.robust_zscore` | ok | 594.26 ms / 598.39 ms | 603.80 ms | 67.11 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00042√ótol | 73.60x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=512 | `cupy.robust_zscore_normalize` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 60.88 ms / 61.65 ms | 223.51 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00045√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cpu | n=512 | `numpy.robust_zscore` | ok | 6.45 ms / 6.57 ms | 6.76 ms | 1280 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00045√ótol | 0.11x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `cupy.robust_zscore_normalize` | ok | 511.8 ¬µs / 513.3 ¬µs | 6.259 s | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00045√ótol | 2.84x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 180.2 ¬µs / 190.0 ¬µs | 986.94 ms | 68.16 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00045√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| robust_zscore_normalize | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `numpy.robust_zscore` | ok | 6.83 ms / 7.03 ms | 6.95 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00045√ótol | 37.90x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `3ebfa0ef` ¬∑ nitrix `f42e7ff8`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:robust_zscore_normalize -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
